official_functions.role: Select the official Play clientbound player_combat_enter singleton fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official empty body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns player_combat_enter to packet id 0x43.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the player_combat_enter id to ClientboundPlayerCombatEnterPacket.
The official player_combat_enter body is empty through a singleton unit codec.
The fixture uses the official singleton and does not require initialized combat state.
The framed bytes, packet table id, empty body, decoded packet class, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove combat runtime behavior, entity state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer combat runtime behavior, entity state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
